parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Search Product by ID

actor User
participant "<<main>>\nMain" as Main
participant "<<frame>>\nMainMenu" as MainMenu
participant "<<dialog>>\nProductReportDialog" as ProductReportDialog
participant "<<DAO>>\nProductDatabaseDAO" as ProductDatabaseDAO
database Database
participant "<<domain>>\nProduct\n:product" as Product
participant "SimpleListModel\n:model" as SimpleListModel

Main -> MainMenu : <<create>>
User -> MainMenu : clicks 'View Products'
activate MainMenu
MainMenu -> ProductReportDialog : <<create>>
activate ProductReportDialog
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO : <<create>>
note left of ProductReportDialog
as shown in
'View Products'
diagram
end note
ProductReportDialog --> User : list of products\ndisplayed
deactivate ProductReportDialog

User -> ProductReportDialog : user types productID\ninto field; clicks "Search"
activate ProductReportDialog
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO : findProd(productID)
activate ProductDatabaseDAO
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database : search product by ID
activate Database
Database --> ProductDatabaseDAO : resultSet
deactivate Database
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductDatabaseDAO : extract product details\nfrom ResultSet into variables
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Product : <<construct>>
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Product : set products fields\nfrom variables
activate Product
deactivate Product
ProductDatabaseDAO -> SimpleListModel : <<construct>>
ProductDatabaseDAO -> SimpleListModel : updateItems(products)
activate SimpleListModel
deactivate SimpleListModel
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductReportDialog : jList.setModel(model)
deactivate ProductDatabaseDAO
ProductReportDialog --> User : product displayed
deactivate ProductReportDialog
deactivate MainMenu

@enduml
```
